summary: Ukrainian forces used FPV drones to destroy a Russian TOS-1A MLRS after it was initially damaged by a Bulava loitering munition, causing missile detonations. In the Donbas and Krasny Liman directions, the Russian "Rubicon" Center coordinated with Aerospace Forces to destroy 112 Ukrainian UAV launch sites on April 20, 2026. The 66th Separate Mechanized Brigade evacuated a wounded soldier using ground unmanned systems, while the 35th Marine Brigade's 2nd Battalion reported successful operations against Russian UAVs. Ukrainian FPV drones also targeted Russian soldiers on motorcycles and killed a soldier who attempted to fake surrender before fleeing. In Kostiantynivka, Ukrainian troops survived an FPV attack after detecting the drone with handheld equipment.
